Private ArchiveCathy Garden
HomeLibraryUploadLogin
For Cathy Only

A quiet archive built around a garden home.

Cathy Garden is becoming a private place for uploading, keeping, and revisiting the photos and videos that matter most.

Open the libraryStart an upload

A warm, private home for photos and videos, shaped around the garden mood you wanted from the start.

Upload

Bring in phone photos and videos with room to grow.

The first version focuses on safe upload flows and a calm mobile experience, then expands feature by feature.

Library

See everything as a private home archive, not a dashboard.

The media library will become the daily center of the app, with room for thumbnails, dates, and later albums.

Storage

Keep originals in Amazon S3 while the app manages the experience.

The Next.js app will handle access, metadata, and upload orchestration while S3 stores the actual media files.
